extraction.one_line_summary: THOMAS Geraint attacked 5km from finish on Poman climb, soloed to victory while DUMOULIN bridged late for second ahead of SAGAN Peter
tactical_patterns: THOMAS attacked same location ŠTYBAR used previous year, suggesting Poman 5km-out point is key reconnaissance knowledge for winning moves
Quick-Step set tempo for JUNGELS but THOMAS counter-accelerated within existing move, exploiting domestique hesitation between protected riders
DUMOULIN chose late solo bridge rather than organize chase, prioritizing GC seconds over stage win when collaboration stalled

rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: responded to every acceleration before launching winning move, rediscovered form after TTT disappointment
rider_signals.JUNGELS Bob: neutral: animated attacks but refused chase duty when CASTROVIEJO pressured him, protecting energy over team tactics
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: positive: late solo effort gained GC time on rivals when group wouldn't chase, tactical pragmatism over stage hunt
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: positive: unexpected podium on selective climb suggests untapped late-race climbing form beyond sprint finishes
rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: negative: abandoned race early, removing expected sprint threat and altering finale tactics
rider_signals.CASTROVIEJO Jonathan: negative: demanded JUNGELS chase instead of contributing, exposed Quick-Step internal hierarchy confusion
